summary: Iteration 43: Bug Fix RETRY VERIFIED SUCCESS - Table Alcohol ID Verification Flow Working Correctly. The handleIdVerified refactoring at line 200 in TablePage.js is functioning as expected. ID modal appears, checkbox works, confirm adds item, toast shows success ('IPA Draft added'), no error messages. Backend E2E also passes.

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: After confirming ID verification in the Table module for an alcoholic item, the system was showing 'ID verification failed' and NOT adding the item
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: tapAPI.verifyId() could fail (e.g., closed session) and the entire catch block would prevent the item from being added
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: verifyId is now best-effort (fails silently), modal closes immediately, and add-item runs independently. Code captures sessionId/item locally before async ops

evidence.backend_e2e: Full flow tested: POST /api/table/open → POST /api/tap/session/{id}/verify-id → POST /api/tap/session/{id}/add → GET /api/table/{id} confirms item appears
evidence.frontend_e2e: Playwright verified: (1) ID modal appears, (2) checkbox checked, (3) confirm clicked, (4) IPA Draft added at $9.00, (5) 'ID verified' badge shown, (6) success toast 'IPA Draft added'

steps: POST /api/tap/session/{id}/add with IPA Draft → line_item_id returned, session_total: 9
GET /api/table/{table_id} → session_id_verified: true, items contains IPA Draft
ID Verification modal appears with checkbox
Check checkbox 'I have verified this guest's ID (21+)'
Item added successfully - order shows IPA Draft x1 $9.00

Tables_Occupied_Status_Consistency.description: All occupied tables have OPEN sessions (verified 2 samples)

TAP_Bar_No_ID_Verification.description: TAP/Bar does NOT show ID verification modal for alcohol items - correct business logic

seed_data_creation: Created 'Frontend Test Guest 2' session on Table #7 with IPA Draft item during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix VERIFIED working in iteration 43. Table alcohol ID verification flow: handleIdVerified at TablePage.js line 200 captures sessionId and itemToAdd before async ops, verifyId fails silently, add-item runs independently. Frontend test confirmed item added successfully with success toast and ID verified badge. TAP/Bar correctly does NOT have ID modal.
